events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被问到：“torque-to-yield bolts reused (TRD/CC - one-time use)”。这是一个明确的缺陷：扭矩-屈服螺栓是一次性使用的，不能重复使用。因此，这是不合格的。工作阶段是rough-complete（粗安装完成，但未收尾）。组件条件应该是installed-defective（安装的缺陷件）。决策应为fail。风险应为high或critical，因为重复使用TTY螺栓可能导致接头失效，引发严重安全后果。根据OEM/工程规范，这是不允许的。

我们需要生成JSON。work_stage: rough-complete。percent_complete: 估计一个值，比如80%（已安装但未最后检查）。value: 无数字读数，设为0。confidence: 高，比如0.95。findings: 列出缺陷线索，如“重复使用的扭矩-屈服螺栓”，“一次性螺栓被重复使用”，“可见标记显示先前拧紧或塑性变形”等。但场景只说了“torque-to-yield bolts reused”，我们可以说“Torque-to-yield bolts that have been previously tightened are reused”。actions: “立即更换为新螺栓并按照规范拧紧”，“停止使用该组件直至更换”，“执行质量控制检查”。rationale: 解释TTY螺栓设计为一次性使用，重复使用可能导致螺栓过载和断裂。references: “OEM/engineering specs”或具体标准如“per manufacturer specifications, TTY bolts are single-use only”。component_conditions: ["installed-defective"]。risk: “critical”可能合适，因为涉及结构完整性。sound_source等不适用，留默认值或空。order: 空列表。workable: 空。

需要返回完整的JSON。注意：decision必须为"fail"。

因此，最终响应：
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.98,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Torque-to-yield bolts are reused (single-use fasteners)",
    "Bolts may show signs of previous tightening or plastic deformation"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work on the affected assembly",
    "Replace all reused TTY bolts with new, approved fasteners",
    "Torque using specified procedure (e.g., angle-controlled method)",
    "Re-inspect after replacement"
  ],
  "rationale": "Torque-to-yield bolts are designed to be permanently deformed during the initial tightening to achieve precise clamp load. Reusing them risks inadequate clamping force, bolt relaxation, or fracture under service loads, violating OEM/engineering specifications.",
  "references": [
    "OEM/engineering specifications for TTY fastener application",
    "Industry standard torque procedure documents"
  ]
}

注意：work_stage 必须是"rough-complete"，如场景所述。percent_complete 我给了85，因为是粗装完成。也可以给80。findings 可以更简洁。确保JSON有效。
